upi: Never approve UPI collect requests from unknown numbers.
Check sender ID – banks use official shortcodes.
Do not click links in UPI messages.
Disable auto-debit in your UPI app.
If unsure, call your bank directly.
job: Legitimate companies never ask for registration fees.
Verify company on official website before paying.
Do not share bank details for 'job confirmation'.
Be wary of WFH offers with upfront payment.
lottery: You cannot win a lottery you did not enter.
No legitimate lottery asks for processing fees.
Do not send money to claim 'prizes'.
Block and report such numbers immediately.
Share this with family to spread awareness.
phishing: Banks never ask for OTP/PIN via links or calls.
Do not click KYC links in SMS – go to bank app directly.
Check URL – fake sites often have typos.
Report to 1930 if you shared any details.
investment: No legitimate investment guarantees fixed high returns.
Never invest via unknown links or WhatsApp.
Report to 1930 or SEBI if cheated.
courier: India Post/Courier never asks for customs via SMS links.
Verify tracking on official website only.
Do not pay customs for unsolicited parcels.
Call the courier company directly to verify.
loan: Banks never offer instant loan without verification.
No legitimate lender asks processing fee upfront.
Never share OTP or bank details for 'approval'.
Check RBI list of registered NBFCs.
matrimonial: Never share bank details or OTP with unknown matches.
Be wary of NRI profiles asking for money.
Verify identity through video call first.
Report fake profiles to the matrimonial site.
Share this with family using such sites.
crypto: Never send crypto to unknown wallets.
others: Never share OTP, PIN, or passwords with anyone.
Verify any request through official channels.
When in doubt, do not act – call 1930.
Educate family members about common scams.
Keep your phone and apps updated.
